title: Classic Ratatouille
description: A rustic Provençal vegetable stew of aubergine, courgette, peppers and tomatoes, slow-simmered with garlic and herbes de Provence. Naturally vegan and gluten-free.
steps: Dice the aubergine, courgettes and bell peppers into roughly 2 cm cubes. Chop the onion finely and mince the garlic.
Score a small cross on the base of each tomato, blanch in boiling water for 30 seconds, then peel and dice them.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté the onion and garlic for 3-4 minutes until translucent.
Add the aubergine and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it starts to soften.
Add the peppers and courgettes, then stir in the tomatoes, herbes de Provence, bay leaf, salt and pepper.
Cover and simmer on low heat for 35-40 minutes, stirring occasionally, until all the vegetables are tender and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the bay leaf, tear over the fresh basil, and adjust seasoning to taste before serving.
footnote: Tastes even better the next day. Serve warm as a side, or as a main with crusty bread or rice.
